prompt: A snowy arctic tundra at night. Pristine white snow with bluish shadows, snow-dusted boulders, and sparse frost-covered shrubs in the mid-ground. Dramatic aurora borealis in vivid green, purple, and cyan swirling across a dark starry sky. Abstract artistic style with luminous swirling colors and painterly brushwork. Off-screen to the right: a frozen lake with cracked blue ice reflecting the aurora, and a lone ice-covered dead tree. Off-screen to the left: a cluster of snow-capped rock formations and a distant wolf silhouette on a ridge. First-person viewer. First-person perspective, eye-level, looking forward across the open tundra.
